protocol.name: variable-resolution
protocol.objective: Resolve template variables in workflow.yaml against _symphony/_config/global.yaml before the workflow engine proceeds to preflight-check.

mandates.mandate: Two-level resolution only: workflow.yaml references resolve against global.yaml. No module-level inheritance chain.
No pre-resolved cache at v0.0.2-alpha.1. All resolution is runtime.
If any variable cannot be resolved, HALT with status halted_unresolved_variable. Do not guess or use defaults.

supported-variables.variable: The absolute filesystem path of the Symphony-installed project root. Read from {project-root}/_symphony/_config/global.yaml field project_root. If the field is missing, use the directory containing _symphony/.

Where application source code lives. Read global.yaml field project_path. If the value is "." or the field is missing, set project-path = project-root. Otherwise project-path = project-root/project_path.
Absolute path to the Symphony memory root. Default: project-root/_symphony/_memory. Override via global.yaml field memory_path.
Absolute path to the checkpoint directory. Default: memory-path/checkpoints. Override via global.yaml field checkpoint_path.
Absolute path of the current workflow directory (the directory containing workflow.yaml).
Current ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) at workflow start.

step.title: Resolve core variables
step.action: Set project-root to the detected filesystem path
Set project-path per the rule above
Set memory-path per the rule above
Set checkpoint-path per the rule above
Set installed-path to the directory containing the current workflow.yaml
Set date to the current ISO-8601 date

step.title: Substitute in workflow.yaml
step.action: Walk workflow.yaml string values and substitute every {var} occurrence with its resolved value

step.title: HALT if unresolved
step.action: If any substitution left an unresolved {var}, HALT with status halted_unresolved_variable and the list of unresolved variable names

step.title: Return resolved config
step.action: Return the substituted workflow.yaml to the calling engine
